title: Dense Comforting Moroccan Ricotta Khlea
description: A rich and comforting dessert made with Moroccan spices, creamy ricotta cheese, and a hint of bitterness from the bitter orange blossom water. Perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Ricotta cheese
ingredients.notes: whole-milk ricotta works best for this dish

ingredients.name: Almond flour
ingredients.notes: a blend of ground almonds and flour

ingredients.name: Coconut sugar
ingredients.notes: substitute with maple syrup for a different flavor profile

ingredients.name: Bitter orange blossom water
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, may be too strong for some

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the ricotta cheese, almond flour, and coconut sugar until smooth.
Add the bitter orange blossom water and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown and the center is set.
Remove the khlea from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
